scripts.migrate:auth: sh -c 'for f in services/auth-service/sql/migrations/*.sql; do docker exec -i teamboard-postgres psql -U teamboard -d teamboard -f - < "$f"; done'
scripts.migrate:tasks: sh -c 'for f in services/task-service/sql/migrations/*.sql; do docker exec -i teamboard-postgres psql -U teamboard -d teamboard -f - < "$f"; done'
scripts.migrate: npm run migrate:tasks && npm run migrate:auth
